payload.answer: SELECT-only mode permits read-only SELECT queries such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`; mutating statements such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied. No durable memory should be committed from this fixture.
citations: Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied

entity_resolution.reason: Input describes an admin SQL permission/debug scenario, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Preserved the distinction between allowed SELECT and denied DELETE behavior.
